title: Mace to Stormbreaker
description: This texture pack makes the default mace look like Stormbreaker!
body:
# **Mace to Stormbreaker**

**Hi!**

### This texture pack makes the default mace look like Stormbreaker!

![Wallpaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09495e934ed48612558d02fdea383ecdcac32384.jpeg)

Version: 1.21.X

### **Meke sure to download optimized version!**
The optimized version weighs less and works faster.


**I hope you enjoy it!**

Lordd727
